songs.title: Mr. Brightside
feed: “Mr. Brightside” by The Killers spends a 6th week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.
“Mr. Brightside” by The Killers is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 93,630,075 streams units.
“Mr. Brightside” by The Killers is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 94,878,000 airplay units.
“Mr. Brightside” by The Killers is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 401,338 total units.

songs.title: Father Figure
feed: “Father Figure” by Taylor Swift climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 61 spots to #2.
“Father Figure” by Taylor Swift is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 534% to 444 points.
“Father Figure” by Taylor Swift is the biggest position gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 61 spots to #2.
“Father Figure” by Taylor Swift is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 13,462 sales units.
